zh.Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, Unit: 英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利朗阿騰
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Melin ap Gruffudd於大約1435年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Gruffudd ap Hywel7歲，母親Gwen ferch Ieuan25歲。他於大約1460年與Alswn ferch Morgan在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, Unit: 英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利朗阿騰
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Melin ap Gruffudd于大约1435年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Gruffudd ap Hywel7岁，母亲Gwen ferch Ieuan25岁。他于大约1460年与Alswn ferch Morgan在威尔士结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Melin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern name of uncertain origin, probably a variant of the less common Melville . The variant Melvyn is associated particularly with the film star Melvyn Douglas ( 1901–81 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Melin ap Gruffudd was born about 1435, in Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Gruffudd ap Hywel, was 7 and his mother, Gwen ferch Ieuan, was 25. He married Alswn ferch Morgan about 1460, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, Unit: Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Melin ap Gruffudd est né environ 1435, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Gruffudd ap Hywel, avait 7 ans et sa mère, Gwen ferch Ieuan, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alswn ferch Morgan environ 1460, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Melin ap Gruffudd um 1435 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd ap Hywel 7 und seine Mutter Gwen ferch Ieuan 25. Er hat um 1460 in Wales Alswn ferch Morgan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

ht.Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, Unit: Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Melin ap Gruffudd è nato il circa 1435 nel Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Gruffudd ap Hywel, aveva 7 anni e il suo madre, Gwen ferch Ieuan, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alswn ferch Morgan circa 1460, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: John Melin ap Gruffuddが約1435年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ap Hywelは7歳，母Gwen ferch Ieuanは25歳であった。約1460年にウェールズでAlswn ferch Morganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Melin ap Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1435년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Hywel(은)는 7세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwen ferch Ieuan(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 웨일스에서 Alswn ferch Morgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

mg.Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, Unit: Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, Unit: Llangathen, Caermardī, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Melin ap Gruffudd nasceu aproximadamente 1435, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Gruffudd ap Hywel, tinha 7 anos e sua mãe, Gwen ferch Ieuan, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alswn ferch Morgan aproximadamente 1460, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas.

ro.Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, Unit: Llangathen, Carmarthenshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Melin ap Gruffudd родился около 1435 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Hywel было 7 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwen ferch Ieuan, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alswn ferch Morgan около 1460 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Melin ap Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1435, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Gruffudd ap Hywel, tenía 7 años y su mamá, Gwen ferch Ieuan, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alswn ferch Morgan aproximadamente 1460, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas.
